'''鈭歽-m-n''' ('''kayaman''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fidge|fidge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fidge|fidge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-m-n
|-
! Lemma
| kayaman
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyaman|thiyaman]] || [[word:jiyaman|jiyaman]] || [[word:shiyaman|shiyaman]] || [[word:kiyaman|kiyaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyaman|thuthuyaman]] || [[word:jujuyaman|jujuyaman]] || [[word:shushuyaman|shushuyaman]] || [[word:kukuyaman|kukuyaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyaman|thuyaman]] || [[word:juyaman|juyaman]] || [[word:shuyaman|shuyaman]] || [[word:kuyaman|kuyaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyaman|thuyaman]] || [[word:juyaman|juyaman]] || [[word:shuyaman|shuyaman]] || [[word:kuyaman|kuyaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyaman|theyaman]] || [[word:jeyaman|jeyaman]] || [[word:sheyaman|sheyaman]] || [[word:keyaman|keyaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyaman|thothoyaman]] || [[word:jojoyaman|jojoyaman]] || [[word:shoshoyaman|shoshoyaman]] || [[word:kokoyaman|kokoyaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyaman|thoyaman]] || [[word:joyaman|joyaman]] || [[word:shoyaman|shoyaman]] || [[word:koyaman|koyaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyaman|thoyaman]] || [[word:joyaman|joyaman]] || [[word:shoyaman|shoyaman]] || [[word:koyaman|koyaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yaman|th忙yaman]] || [[word:j忙yaman|j忙yaman]] || [[word:sh忙yaman|sh忙yaman]] || [[word:k忙yaman|k忙yaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayaman|thathayaman]] || [[word:jajayaman|jajayaman]] || [[word:shashayaman|shashayaman]] || [[word:kakayaman|kakayaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayaman|thayaman]] || [[word:jayaman|jayaman]] || [[word:shayaman|shayaman]] || [[word:kayaman|kayaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayaman|thayaman]] || [[word:jayaman|jayaman]] || [[word:shayaman|shayaman]] || [[word:kayaman|kayaman]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayaman|shayaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayaman|goshayaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayaman|gokishayaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayaman眉|shayaman眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayamankn眉|goshayamankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayaman眉|gokishayaman眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayamansh毛|shayamansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayamanksh毛|goshayamanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayamansh毛|gokishayamansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayamanro|shayamanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayamankro|goshayamankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayamanro|gokishayamanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayamanmu|shayamanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayamankmu|goshayamankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayamanmu|gokishayamanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayamansher|shayamansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayamanksher|goshayamanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayamansher|gokishayamansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayamang|shayamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayamankng|goshayamankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayamang|gokishayamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayamanya|shayamanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayamankya|goshayamankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayamanya|gokishayamanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayamanyam|shayamanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayamankyam|goshayamankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayamanyam|gokishayamanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayaman眉sh毛|shayaman眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayamankn眉sh毛|goshayamankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayaman眉sh毛|gokishayaman眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayaman眉ro|shayaman眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayamankn眉ro|goshayamankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayaman眉ro|gokishayaman眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayaman眉mu|shayaman眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayamankn眉mu|goshayamankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayaman眉mu|gokishayaman眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayamansh毛n眉|shayamansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayamanksh毛n眉|goshayamanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayamansh毛n眉|gokishayamansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayamansh毛ro|shayamansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayamanksh毛ro|goshayamanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayamansh毛ro|gokishayamansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayamansh毛mu|shayamansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayamanksh毛mu|goshayamanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayamansh毛mu|gokishayamansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayamanron眉|shayamanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayamankron眉|goshayamankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayamanron眉|gokishayamanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayamanrosh毛|shayamanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayamankrosh毛|goshayamankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayamanrosh毛|gokishayamanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayamanromu|shayamanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayamankromu|goshayamankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayamanromu|gokishayamanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayamanmun眉|shayamanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayamankmun眉|goshayamankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayamanmun眉|gokishayamanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayamanmush毛|shayamanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayamankmush毛|goshayamankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayamanmush毛|gokishayamanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayamanmuro|shayamanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayamankmuro|goshayamankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayamanmuro|gokishayamanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
